response.justification: Bogdan possesses excellent experience in high-throughput distributed systems and highly relevant recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. However, despite his strong TypeScript and architectural skills, his resume lacks any mention of Python, which is a primary technical requirement for this role.
strengths: Direct recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated Staff-level ownership, including founding an open-source platform and driving technical practices like TDD and CI/CD.
concerns: Lacks any demonstrated experience with Python, which is a strict must-have for the role.
Track record shows relatively short tenures (1-3 years) across multiple recent roles.
Historically relied on niche languages (Dlang) for backend performance rather than standard ecosystem tools.
